summary: Completed frontend testing for Iteration 29 - Variant Comparison Modal redesign. All features working correctly: modal opens on linked product card click (both grid and list view), side-by-side layout displays correctly, summary stats shown, Select All/Deselect All works, checkboxes functional, hover effects present, and action buttons (1688 link, Unlink) don't trigger modal.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement recommended

action_items: Consider adding DialogDescription to VariantComparisonModal for better accessibility (optional)
critical_code_review_comments: VariantComparisonModal.jsx properly extracted as separate component with clean structure
data-testid attributes correctly placed on modal, buttons, and variant cards
Event propagation properly handled with onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()} on action buttons
Side-by-side layout implemented with grid-cols-2 and proper scrollable areas
Summary stats displayed with StatCard component showing Shopify count, 1688 count, Missing count, Synced count
Select All/Deselect All toggle works correctly with selectedVariants state
Product cards have proper hover effects with 'View Variants' overlay for linked products
Cursor changes to pointer for linked products indicating clickability
seed_data_creation: Used existing linked products - ARVO Aero 15 (3 Shopify variants, 30 1688 variants)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 29 tested Variant Comparison Modal redesign. Key data-testids: variant-comparison-modal, select-all-missing, close-modal-btn, create-variants-btn, product-card-grid-{id}, product-card-list-{id}. Modal opens when clicking linked product cards (orange 'Linked' badge). Known P0 auth bug causes frequent logouts - handle re-login if needed.

modal_layout.header: Product title with Package icon, truncated at 60 chars
modal_layout.stats_row: 4 stat cards - Shopify Variants (emerald), 1688 Variants (blue), Missing in Shopify (red), Already Synced (emerald)
modal_layout.left_column: Shopify Variants with emerald header, scrollable list
modal_layout.right_column: 1688 Variants with orange header, Missing section with checkboxes, Matched section
modal_layout.footer: Selection count, Close button, Create Variants button (orange)

hover_effects.linked_products: Orange gradient overlay with 'View Variants' text and Layers icon
hover_effects.cursor: pointer for linked products, default for unlinked

known_issues.P0_auth_bug: Frequent logouts require re-login during testing - handled by test scripts
